questions.question: What is the absolute value of $x$ on a number line?
A music producer wants to mix two sound waves with frequencies of $-25$ Hz and $30$ Hz. What is the absolute value of the difference between these frequencies?
An artist is creating a painting on a canvas that is $12$ feet wide and $-8$ feet long. What is the absolute value of the length?
A musician is playing a rhythm pattern with a tempo of $-120$ beats per minute (bpm). What is the absolute value of this tempo?
A sound engineer is adjusting the decibel level of a speaker, which is currently at $-20$ decibels. What is the absolute value of this decibel level?
A painter is mixing two colors with pigment values of $15$ and $-20$. What is the absolute value of the difference between these pigment values?

A musician is playing a song with a frequency of $-18$ Hz. If the musician wants to increase the frequency by $12$ Hz, what will be the new frequency? Show your work and explain your answer in the space provided below.

An artist is creating a sculpture with a height of $-25$ inches and a width of $30$ inches. What is the absolute value of the difference between the height and the width? Show your work and explain your answer in the space provided below.

teacher_rules: Tip 1: Ensure students understand the concept of absolute value as distance from zero.
Tip 2: Encourage students to use real-world examples, such as music and art, to illustrate absolute value.
Tip 3: Remind students to show their work and explain their answers clearly.
